---
title: "Feature Modules"
format: html
---

# Feature Modules и их взаимосвязи

Диаграммы связей между функциональными модулями приложения.

## Feature Dependencies Graph

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-01
%%| fig-cap: "Diagram 1"
graph TB
    subgraph "Core Infrastructure"
        DS[Design System]
        L10n[Localization]
        Nav[Navigation]
        DI[Hilt DI]
    end
    
    subgraph "Feature Modules"
        Library[Library Feature]
        Player[Player Feature]  
        Search[Search Feature]
        Downloads[Downloads Feature]
        Settings[Settings Feature]
        Auth[Auth Feature]
        Topic[Topic Feature]
        WebView[WebView Feature]
    end
    
    subgraph "Shared Data"
        BooksRepo[BooksRepository]
        PrefsRepo[PreferencesRepository]
        AudioService[AudioPlayerService]
        DownloadService[DownloadService]
    end
    
    %% All features depend on infrastructure
    Library --> DS
    Player --> DS
    Search --> DS
    Downloads --> DS
    Settings --> DS
    Auth --> DS
    Topic --> DS
    WebView --> DS
    
    Library --> L10n
    Player --> L10n
    Search --> L10n
    Downloads --> L10n
    Settings --> L10n
    Auth --> L10n
    Topic --> L10n
    WebView --> L10n
    
    Library --> Nav
    Player --> Nav
    Search --> Nav
    Downloads --> Nav
    Settings --> Nav
    Auth --> Nav
    Topic --> Nav
    WebView --> Nav
    
    %% Feature to shared data dependencies
    Library --> BooksRepo
    Library --> PrefsRepo
    Player --> AudioService
    Player --> BooksRepo
    Search --> BooksRepo
    Downloads --> DownloadService
    Settings --> PrefsRepo
    Auth --> PrefsRepo
    Topic --> DownloadService
    
    %% Inter-feature navigation
    Library -.navigates.-> Player
    Library -.navigates.-> Search
    Library -.navigates.-> Downloads
    Search -.navigates.-> Player
    Search -.navigates.-> Topic
    Settings -.navigates.-> Auth
    Auth -.navigates.-> WebView
    
    style DS fill:#e1f5ff
    style L10n fill:#e1f5ff
    style Nav fill:#e1f5ff
    style DI fill:#e1f5ff
```

## Feature Communication Patterns

### 1. Navigation Communication

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-02
%%| fig-cap: "Diagram 2"
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Library
    
    Library --> Player: Book selected
    Library --> Search: Search icon
    Library --> Downloads: Downloads icon
    
    Search --> Player: Local book
    Search --> Topic: Online book
    
    Settings --> Auth: Login
    Auth --> WebView: OAuth
    
    Player --> Library: Back
    Search --> Library: Back
    Downloads --> Library: Back
    Topic --> Search: Back
    WebView --> Auth: Back
    Auth --> Settings: Back
```

### 2. Shared Repository Pattern

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-03
%%| fig-cap: "Diagram 3"
graph LR
    subgraph "Features"
        F1[Library Feature]
        F2[Player Feature]
        F3[Search Feature]
    end
    
    subgraph "Domain"
        UC1[GetBooksUseCase]
        UC2[DeleteBookUseCase]
        UC3[SearchBooksUseCase]
    end
    
    subgraph "Data"
        Repo[BooksRepository<br/>Single Source of Truth]
        DB[(Room Database)]
    end
    
    F1 --> UC1
    F2 --> UC1
    F3 --> UC3
    
    UC1 --> Repo
    UC2 --> Repo
    UC3 --> Repo
    
    Repo --> DB
    
    DB -.Flow updates.-> Repo
    Repo -.Flow updates.-> UC1
    UC1 -.Flow updates.-> F1
    UC1 -.Flow updates.-> F2
    
    style Repo fill:#fff3e0
    style DB fill:#c8e6c9
```

## Module Dependency Rules

### Allowed Dependencies

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-04
%%| fig-cap: "Diagram 4"
graph TD
    UI[UI/Feature Layer] --> Domain[Domain Layer]
    Domain --> Data[Data Layer]
    Data --> External[External APIs]
    
    UI -.DI.-> Hilt[Hilt DI]
    Domain -.DI.-> Hilt
    Data -.DI.-> Hilt
    
    style UI fill:#e3f2fd
    style Domain fill:#fff3e0
    style Data fill:#ffecb3
```

### Forbidden Dependencies

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-05
%%| fig-cap: "Diagram 5"
graph TD
    Data[Data Layer] -.X.-> UI[UI Layer]
    Domain[Domain Layer] -.X.-> UI
    External[External APIs] -.X.-> Data
    
    Feature1[Feature Module] -.X.-> Feature2[Another Feature]
    
    style Data fill:#ffcdd2
    style Domain fill:#ffcdd2
    style External fill:#ffcdd2
    style Feature1 fill:#ffcdd2
```

## Feature Module Structure

Each feature follows this structure:

```
feature/
├── FeatureScreen.kt          # Composable UI
├── FeatureViewModel.kt       # State management
├── FeatureUiState.kt          # UI state model
└── components/                # Feature-specific components
    ├── Component1.kt
    └── Component2.kt
```

## Data Flow per Feature

### Library Feature

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-06
%%| fig-cap: "Diagram 6"
graph LR
    User([User Action]) --> UI[LibraryScreen]
    UI --> VM[LibraryViewModel]
    VM --> UC[GetBooksUseCase]
    UC --> Repo[BooksRepository]
    Repo --> DB[(Room DB)]
    
    DB -.Flow.-> Repo
    Repo -.Flow.-> UC
    UC -.Flow.-> VM
    VM -.StateFlow.-> UI
    UI --> Display[Display Books]
    
    style UI fill:#e3f2fd
    style VM fill:#fff3e0
    style Repo fill:#ffecb3
```

### Player Feature

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-07
%%| fig-cap: "Diagram 7"
graph LR
    User([User Action]) --> UI[PlayerScreen]
    UI --> VM[PlayerViewModel]
    VM --> Service[AudioPlayerService]
    Service --> ExoPlayer[ExoPlayer]
    Service --> DB[(Room DB)]
    
    ExoPlayer -.Events.-> Service
    Service -.Updates.-> VM
    VM -.StateFlow.-> UI
    
    DB -.Positions.-> Service
    Service -.Save.-> DB
    
    style UI fill:#e3f2fd
    style VM fill:#fff3e0
    style Service fill:#f3e5f5
```

### Downloads Feature

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-08
%%| fig-cap: "Diagram 8"
graph LR
    User([User Action]) --> UI[DownloadsScreen]
    UI --> VM[DownloadViewModel]
    VM --> UC[DownloadUseCase]
    UC --> Repo[DownloadRepository]
    Repo --> Service[DownloadService]
    Service --> Torrent[LibTorrent]
    Service --> DB[(Room DB)]
    
    Torrent -.Progress.-> Service
    Service -.Updates.-> DB
    DB -.Flow.-> Repo
    Repo -.Flow.-> UC
    UC -.Flow.-> VM
    VM -.StateFlow.-> UI
    
    style UI fill:#e3f2fd
    style VM fill:#fff3e0
    style Service fill:#e8f5e9
```

## Shared Components

### Design System Components

All features use these shared UI components:

- `JabookTopAppBar`: Standard app bar
- `LoadingScreen`: Loading indicator
- `ErrorScreen`: Error display
- `BookCard`: Book item display
- `EmptyState`: Empty list state
- `SearchBar`: Search input
- `ProgressIndicator`: Progress display

### Navigation Routes

Type-safe navigation routes defined in `NavigationRoutes.kt`:

```kotlin
@Serializable object LibraryRoute
@Serializable data class PlayerRoute(val bookId: String)
@Serializable object SearchRoute
@Serializable object DownloadsRoute
@Serializable object SettingsRoute
@Serializable object AuthRoute
@Serializable data class TopicRoute(val topicId: String)
@Serializable data class WebViewRoute(val url: String)
```

## Anti-Patterns to Avoid

### ❌ Direct Feature-to-Feature Dependencies

```kotlin
// BAD
class LibraryViewModel @Inject constructor(
    private val playerViewModel: PlayerViewModel // ❌
)
```

### ✅ Use Shared Repository Instead

```kotlin
// GOOD
class LibraryViewModel @Inject constructor(
    private val booksRepository: BooksRepository // ✅
)

class PlayerViewModel @Inject constructor(
    private val booksRepository: BooksRepository // ✅
)
```

### ❌ ViewModels in Composables

```kotlin
// BAD
@Composable
fun LibraryScreen(
    playerViewModel: PlayerViewModel // ❌
)
```

### ✅ Navigation Instead

```kotlin
// GOOD
@Composable
fun LibraryScreen(
    onBookClick: (String) -> Unit // ✅
)

// In NavHost
navController.navigate(PlayerRoute(bookId))
```

## Module Communication Summary

1. **Via Navigation**: Screen → Screen transitions
2. **Via Shared Repository**: Multiple features observing same data
3. **Via Services**: Features controlling background services
4. **Via DI**: Shared dependencies injected where needed

**Never**: Direct feature-to-feature dependencies or ViewModel sharing
